# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:5000
    routes:
      - name: user-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:5000
    routes:
      - name: order-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
  - name: payment-service
    url: http://payment-service:5000
    routes:
      - name: payment-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/payments
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    service: user-service
    config:
      second: 5
      minute: 100
  - name: key-auth
    service: order-service
  - name: cors
    service: payment-service
    config:
      origins:
        - http://example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
